since_last: 64% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +5.14%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.04% · BTC +2.54% · Gold +1.47% · Nasdaq100 -1.19%. 64% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +5.14%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +5.14%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.47%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at -12.28%
cards.body: Leaders: APP +10.90%, META +10.33%, CRWD +10.12%, PLTR +9.27%, PATH +8.14%. Laggards: KLAC -12.28%, LRCX -11.51%, TER -11.18%, AMAT -11.11%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.47% at $161.52
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.47% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
